rationale: The citing paper’s core framework links customer mind-set brand equity to current/future financial performance under short time series, while the cited paper specifically develops a dynamic integrative model connecting marketing actions, mind-set metrics, and performance (including timing/wear-in effects). Given this close construct and modeling overlap, and an exact DOI reference match (10.1509/jmkr.47.4.672), the citation is plausibly foundational/method-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention.
